capability.name: Prop Robotics Physx Profile
capability.description:
**Profile:** Prop-Robotics-Physx  
**Version:** 0.1.0  
**Asset Class:** Prop  
**Target Use Case:** High-performance robotics simulation with NVIDIA PhysX

requirements.name: physx-collider-capability
requirements.message: CollisionAPI may only be applied to a UsdGeom Gprim or to an Xform that has PhysxMeshMergeCollisionAPI and whose collisionmeshes collection includes at least one Gprim.

requirements.name: nested-rigid-body-mass
requirements.message: Rigid bodies a mass specificatied, or provide necessary information to compute the mass.

requirements.name: no-nested-rigid-body-without-joint
requirements.message: Rigid bodies should not be nested unless they are connected by a joint.
